name: Smoothie
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup frozen mixed blackberries and raspberries
scant 1/4 cup lite vanilla soy milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the frozen banana to the blender.
2. Add the frozen mixed blackberries and raspberries.
3. Add the applesauce.
4. Add the frozen orange-pineapple juice concentrate.
5. Add the lite vanilla soy milk.
6. Blend until smooth.
